game_info.title: v1
game_info.concept:
Tap to jump into as many hoops as possible. 

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/flappy-dunk/id1235581326

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Tap to jump into as many hoops as possible. 
Collect skins and achieve crazy challenges.
game_info.description: Flap Dunk is a skill-based physics runner where you control a winged basketball. Tap to flap your wings and gain altitude while constantly moving forward. Your goal is to navigate the ball through the hoops that appear along your path. Timing is everything—you must gain enough height to clear the rim, then let gravity pull you down through the hoop to score. Avoid hitting the ground or missing too many hoops!
game_info.controls:
- Space / Arrow Up / Z / W / Click: Flap (Jump up)
- Enter: Start Game
- R: Restart Game
- ESC: Pause / Resume

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic flight mechanics and ground collision.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The bot will press the jump key at a fixed frequency to counteract gravity. The goal is to verify the ball can stay airborne and that the game ends if it touches the ground (by letting it fall eventually).
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player character stays above the ground for a duration, then the game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE when the bot stops jumping.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify scoring mechanics and hoop navigation.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The bot tracks the position of the next hoop. It calculates a target height slightly above the hoop's rim and flaps to reach that apex, then stops flapping to fall through the hoop sensor.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The score increases as the bot successfully navigates through hoops. The game continues in the PLAYING phase for an extended period.
